title: malpighiodes benthamiana
intro: Malpighiodes benthamiana, also known as the 'Clammy Clover', is a plant species belonging to the Malpighiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory infections, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Malpighiodes benthamiana is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
